title: Man found guilty and sentenced for 2024 murder
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   Lutho Gaveni was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   Lutho Gaveni was sentenced to 13 years behind bars last Wednesday, 28 January, for the 2024 murder of Ricardo Petersen.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Lutho Gaveni was sentenced to 13 years behind bars last Wednesday, 28 January, for the 2024 murder of Ricardo Petersen."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gaveni fatally stabbed Petersen in JCC Camp, Mossel Bay, on 28 September 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Da Gamaskop Police arrested Gaveni on 6 October that year.","html":"The Da Gamaskop Police arrested Gaveni on 6 October that year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He pleaded not guilty on 19 November last year, however, the Thembalethu Regional Court found him guilty the next day.","html":"He pleaded not guilty on 19 November last year, however, the Thembalethu Regional Court found him guilty the next day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was then sentenced to 13 years’ direct imprisonment. It was also ruled that he was unfit to possess a firearm.","html":"He was then sentenced to 13 years’ direct imprisonment. It was also ruled that he was unfit to possess a firearm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man found guilty and sentenced for 2024 murder
